title: postauthregisterwithvaliduserdata
description: Verify that POST /auth/register with valid user data returns 200 or 201 status and confirms account creation.

title: postauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /auth/login with registered valid credentials returns 200 status with JWT or session cookie and authentication success.

title: postauthloginwithinvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401 Unauthorized with an appropriate error message.

title: postauthregisterwithinvalidfields
description: Verify that POST /auth/register with missing or invalid fields returns 400 Bad Request with validation error details.

title: getproductoswithauthentication
description: Verify that GET /productos with valid authentication token returns 200 status with a list of products.

title: getproductoswithoutauthentication
description: Verify that GET /productos without authentication returns 401 Unauthorized.

title: postproductoswithvaliddata
description: Verify that POST /productos with valid product data and authentication returns 201 or 200 status with created product details.

title: postproductoswithinvalidpayload
description: Verify that POST /productos with invalid or missing required fields returns 400 Bad Request with validation errors.

title: postventaswithvaliddata
description: Verify that POST /ventas with valid sale data and authentication returns 201 or 200 status confirming sale creation.

title: postventaswithoutauthentication
description: Verify that POST /ventas without authentication returns 401 Unauthorized.
